group_info_aria_label: Open group descriptions in a new tab
alias_invalid: Alias must be lowercase letters, numbers, or hyphens.
one_tag_per_group_warning: Only one tag per group is allowed ({group}).

server_save_failed: Server save failed; switched to patch mode. {message}

promotion_modal_prompt: Choose the canonical tag group for this alias.
promotion_group_invalid: Promotion group must be one of: subject, domain, form, theme.
alias_tags_array_required: Alias tags must be an array.
alias_tags_required: Alias tags must include at least one tag_id.
alias_tags_max: Alias tags may include at most {max_tags} tags.
alias_tags_one_per_group: Alias tags may include only one tag per group: {group}
target_tag_required: At least one canonical target tag_id is required.
target_tags_max: At most {max_tags} target tags are allowed.
target_tags_one_per_group: Only one target tag per group is allowed ({group}).
demotion_target_self: Target list must not include the demoted tag.
import_invalid_json: Import file is not valid JSON.
import_invalid_object: Import file must be a JSON object.
import_missing_aliases_object: Import file must include aliases object with at least one alias.
patch_copy_failed: Copy failed. Select and copy the snippet manually.
server_import_failed: Server import failed; switched to patch mode. {message}
patch_import_none_message: Patch mode ({import_mode}): {imported_count} imported; 0 new aliases to add.
patch_import_message: Patch mode ({import_mode}): {imported_count} imported; {new_count} alias rows prepared for studio/data/canonical/analytics/tag-aliases.json aliases object.
patch_promote_message: Patch mode: section snippets prepared for promoting "{alias_key}".
patch_delete_message: Patch mode: remove this alias key from studio/data/canonical/analytics/tag-aliases.json aliases object.
patch_create_message: Patch mode: alias fragment prepared for new alias "{alias_key}". Paste inside aliases object.
patch_edit_rename_note: Also remove old alias key "{alias_key}" from studio/data/canonical/analytics/tag-aliases.json.
patch_edit_message: Patch mode: alias fragment prepared for "{alias_key}". Paste inside aliases object.{rename_note}
patch_demote_message: Patch mode: section snippets prepared for demoting "{tag_id}".
